category_sources: Official README describes IronClaw as a secure personal AI assistant.
source_facts.description says it is a security-first personal AI assistant with WASM sandbox channels.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading uses IronClaw.
docs_sources: Official repository README contains installation, configuration, security, and architecture documentation.
Official repository includes a docs directory referenced by the README.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/nearai/ironclaw; per instruction repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official README lists security-first features, WASM sandboxing, MCP, plugins, and multi-channel operation.
source_facts.description names the AI assistant, WASM sandbox, and channel concepts.
